Request a Demo
Powered by Cybertron™

Managed Security
Awareness
Built for the Human Layer.

Cybertron is Cybertronium's fully-managed security awareness platform — combining adaptive and experiential learning, phishing simulations and behavioural risk scoring to transform your people from your weakest link into your strongest line of defence.

Request a Cybertron Demo

The Human Risk Reality

Why Security Awareness Matters

Attackers don't break in — they log in. The human layer is now the primary battleground.

74%
of breaches involve the human element
Verizon DBIR
3.4B
phishing emails sent every single day
Industry research
$4.88M
average cost of a data breach in 2024
IBM Cost of Data Breach
60%
of SMBs close within 6 months of a major breach
US National Cyber Security Alliance

Phishing is the #1 attack vector

More than 90% of successful cyber attacks begin with a phishing email targeting an unsuspecting employee.

Humans are the weakest link

Even the best security tools fail when a single user clicks a malicious link or hands over credentials.

AI-powered threats are scaling fast

Generative AI lets attackers craft hyper-personalised lures at a scale and quality never seen before.

Compliance now demands training

ISO 27001, SOC 2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA and RMIT/RBI/SEBI guidelines all mandate ongoing security awareness.

Powered by Cybertron™

Experiential Awareness Training

Don't Just Train Them. Let Them Feel the Attack.

Cybertron is the only managed awareness programme that bundles in our flagship Certified Experiential Cybersecurity Aware User workshop — a live, hands-on day where your people get safely attacked across 12 real-world scenarios and learn to defend in real time.

12
Live attack simulations across mobile, web, email, voice & Wi-Fi
100%
Hands-on — every learner runs the attack and the defence
100%
Workshop format, certification awarded on completion

Voice Cloning

Live AI voice-clone build to expose deepfake fraud risk.

The Code Caper

Malicious QR codes that take over mobile cameras, mics & data.

The Download Disaster

Cloned brand apps laced with malware from untrusted stores.

Form Jacking Pirates

Browser form overlays silently harvesting sensitive data.

AiTM: Friend or Foe?

Adversary-in-the-Middle attacks bypassing SSO and 2FA.

The Scam Corner

APP fraud — fake IT & bank calls hijacking screens via remote tools.

Inbox Bites Back

Spoofed emails from 'known' senders driving BEC payouts.

Zero Day, Dooms Day

Fileless malware that walks past traditional defenses.

MiTM Everywhere

Public Wi-Fi & Evil Twin attacks intercepting enterprise credentials.

Pictures and Mayhem

Malware embedded in WhatsApp images on mobile and laptop.

Doppelganger Gala

Credential stuffing from reused passwords across personal & work apps.

Phish-market

Vishing scripts that trick employees into handing over access.

The Cybertron Platform

One Platform. Six Pillars.

Cybertron unifies learning, simulation, measurement and managed services into a single human-risk programme.

Adaptive Learning

Bite-sized micro-modules personalised by role, risk score and learning history. Built-in gamification keeps engagement high.

Phishing Simulations

Realistic, AI-generated phishing, smishing, vishing and QR-code attacks mapped to current threat campaigns.

Behavioural Risk Scoring

Every user gets a dynamic Human Risk Score. Repeat clickers get extra coaching automatically.

Executive Dashboards

Board-ready reporting on awareness maturity, click rates, repeat offenders and compliance evidence.

Multi-Language Content

Localised training in 12+ languages with regional threat scenarios for global workforces.

Managed by Cybertronium

We design, launch, monitor and refine the entire programme — you get outcomes, not extra workload.

The Cybertron Lifecycle

A Continuous Human-Risk Programme

Discover demand

Baseline phishing test + human risk assessment across your workforce.

Train

Personalised micro-learning paths deployed via Cybertron LMS.

Simulate

Continuous phishing & social-engineering simulations across channels.

Measure

Track Human Risk Score, click rate, report rate & dwell time.

Reinforce

Targeted nudges and just-in-time coaching for high-risk users.

Measurable Outcomes

What Cybertron
Customers Achieve

85%
reduction in phishing click rates within 12 months
5x
increase in suspicious email reporting
90%
training completion across the workforce
100%
audit-ready evidence for ISO, SOC 2, PCI-DSS

Why Cybertronium

Fully Managed. Zero Overhead.

Most awareness platforms hand you a tool and walk away. Cybertron is delivered as a managed service — our human-risk analysts run the programme end-to-end so your team gets the outcomes without the operational load.

  • Dedicated Cybertron programme manager
  • Threat-led simulation calendar
  • Monthly executive risk reviews
  • Audit-ready compliance evidence

Ready to build a
security-aware workforce?

Talk with our specialists about creating lasting security awareness across your organization.
